title: Energy Abilities SMP
description: A Minecraft plugin with cool high quality unlockable abilities. Made for SMPs or just any server.
body:
**A Minecraft plugin with cool high quality unlockable abilities.**
made for use in an smp or a server in general.

Ability paths: **Electric ; Kinetic ;  Vital ; Quantum ; Hydro**

_I tried my best to make the abilities as balanced as i could._
The paths are like a skilltree, and you buy the abilities from left to right.

Unlocking every ability in a path gives a powerful passive, and unlocking every ability gives the user an ultimate ability.

Everyone has **500 energy** and the abilities drain the energy while you regain energy every second.

Commands:
- /energytree (/et) opens the skill tree where you can unlock the abilities
- /energycraft (/ec) shows you the recipe to craft an ability unlocker and the ability resonator to use the abilities.

Admin Commands:
- /adminenergis (/ae) to use: /ae give (player) Booster/Activator
- /energisstart (/es) Use to start your smp with a 15 minute grace period with which it automatically disables and enables pvp, cool effects and expanding the border itself.

You can use abilities by double right clicking and changing between abilities with the ability resonator which you crafted and the abilities you unlocked and equipped (max 3 equipped at once) from /et with the energy booster which you have also crafted.

When a player dies they drop a booster from one of their abilities they've unlocked.

**Custom resource pack for plugin (Optional but recommended to use)**
Resource pack link for server: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1RtkSksJsiUDiFH2PdZ2wi02n36_StMs4

Sha-1 for resource pack: 531ea80e7b80793dcf802701166eeb92106697c7


Textures: Most textures from Faithful / https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/mnz5ay/nether_star_3d_render / https://minecraft.novaskin.me/post/5215186587746304/energy-sword

Tested on 1.21+ (Made for 1.21.10) If has any problems with future updates, I will fix it but im not planning on adding anything.

**If you have any concerns or want anything changed or added join the discord server or mail me on alcatrazontop@gmail.com.**

# Plugin Best Used On Paper 1.21.10+
